Nuwara Eliya · Sri Lanka

Lyra

Your Luxury Mountain Retreat

About Lyra

Lyra exists to make every stay feel intentional — warmth, tranquility, and modern comfort in the heart of Sri Lanka's hill country.

A Haven of Tranquility

Nestled in Sri Lanka's hill country, Lyra Nuwara Eliya offers an unparalleled escape into nature's embrace. Our luxury villa combines modern comfort with traditional charm, providing breathtaking views of rolling tea plantations and misty mountains.

Built with sustainable materials and designed to harmonize with the landscape, our villa features three uniquely designed rooms, each offering its own character and stunning vistas — your perfect base to explore the wonders of Nuwara Eliya.

Explore Our Rooms →

Rooms

12

Guest Capacity

Guest Rating

5+

Years Experience

Accommodations

Our Rooms

Three distinct rooms, each designed to offer comfort, character, and unforgettable views.

Mountain Suite

Night Lily

Wake up to panoramic views of the Nuwara Eliya mountains. A spacious suite with a king-size bed, private balcony, and modern amenities with traditional Sri Lankan touches.

King Size Bed

Private Balcony

Mountain Views

En-suite Bathroom

Up to 4 guests

Tea Garden Room

Timber Lily

Immerse yourself in tea culture with direct views of our private tea garden. Comfort meets authentic Sri Lankan hospitality with curated design elements.

Queen Size Bed

Tea Garden Views

Traditional Decor

Reading Nook

Up to 2 guests

Family Suite

White Lily

Perfect for families or groups — multiple beds and a generous seating area surrounded by the beauty of hill country nature.

Multiple Beds

Seating Area

Family Friendly

Extra Space

Up to 4 guests

Location

Proximity & Access

Strategically placed at the heart of Nuwara Eliya's most beloved experiences.

Gregory Lake

Recreation

Scenic lake perfect for boating and leisurely picnics

2.5 km5 min by car

Nuwara Eliya Golf Club

Sports

Historic 18-hole course with sweeping mountain views

3.2 km7 min by car

Victoria Park

Nature

Beautiful botanical garden in the heart of the city

4.1 km8 min by car

Tea Factory & Museum

Culture

Explore the rich history of Sri Lankan tea production

1.8 km4 min by car

Hakgala Botanical Garden

Nature

Stunning garden home to rare and exotic plant species

8.5 km15 min by car

Seetha Amman Temple

Culture

A historic Hindu temple of deep cultural significance

9.2 km18 min by car

Nearby Attractions

Horton Plains National Park

Famous for World's End cliff and Baker's Falls

Pedro Tea Estate

Historic tea plantation with guided tours

Single Tree Hill
